problem_solved: Medicare patients in underserved communities lack access to primary care that addresses their social and medical needs
solution_description: Value-based primary care provider for Medicare patients with community-centered model. Operates neighborhood clinics with care teams addressing medical, behavioral, and social needs. Provides transportation, social activities, and connects patients to community resources. Acquired by CVS Health
notes: Major value-based primary care provider acquired by CVS. Strong SDOH integration through community model. High Varden fit - proven model for addressing social determinants in primary care. Transportation and social services built into model
